preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true

column.name: title
column.value: Virology Laboratory

column.name: objective
column.value: Complete genomics and bioinformatics analysis workflow from sample reception to data submission

column.name: protocol
column.value: Standard Virology Laboratory Protocol

column.name: content
column.value: Virology Laboratory notebook template with 10 predefined workflow pages for sample reception, DNA/RNA extraction, quality assessment, PCR amplification, gel electrophoresis, library preparation, bioanalyzer QC, sequencing, and bioinformatics analysis.

changeSet.author: openelis-vl

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Reception & Registration page for VL Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Reception & Registration

column.name: instructions
column.value: Register sample receipt: Assign or retain Sample ID, capture organism/tissue type, note sample source and collection date, record requested analysis type, document storage conditions at arrival, receipt date/time, and receiving personnel. Link to research project or study if applicable.

column.name: content
column.value: Sample Reception & Registration - Batch verification and metadata capture of incoming biological samples

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 1

changeSet.author: openelis-vl

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 2

changeSet.comment: Create DNA/RNA Extraction page for VL Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: DNA/RNA Extraction

column.name: instructions
column.value: Document extraction protocol used. Record extraction date/time and technician ID. Select extraction kit/method from dropdown. Document sample quantity and condition. Record extraction yield (ng/µL) and purity (A260/A280 ratio). Document any deviations or observations. Store extracted material location and conditions.

column.name: content
column.value: DNA/RNA Extraction - Nucleic acid isolation and documentation

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 2

changeSet.author: openelis-vl

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3

changeSet.comment: Create Quality & Quantity Assessment page for VL Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Quality & Quantity Assessment

column.name: instructions
column.value: Record QC assessment date/time. Select QC instrument (NanoDrop, Qubit, BioAnalyzer). Document quantity (ng or µg) and purity metrics (A260/A280, A260/A230). Record fragment size if assessed (bp). Document QC status (Pass/Fail) with acceptance criteria. If failed, document reason and recommended action. Capture QC instrument ID and calibration status.

column.name: content
column.value: Quality & Quantity Assessment - QC validation with auto-pass/fail determination

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3

changeSet.author: openelis-vl

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 4

changeSet.comment: Create PCR Amplification page for VL Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: PCR Amplification

column.name: instructions
column.value: Record PCR date/time and technician ID. Select PCR target gene/region and primer set. Select thermal cycler instrument ID. Document PCR master mix composition and volume. Record cycling conditions (annealing temp, cycles, extension time). Document primer final concentrations. Record PCR product yield and estimate. Document any complications or optimization notes. Store PCR product conditions.

column.name: content
column.value: PCR Amplification - Target region amplification and documentation

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 4

changeSet.author: openelis-vl

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 5

changeSet.comment: Create Gel Electrophoresis page for VL Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Gel Electrophoresis

column.name: instructions
column.value: Record gel date/time and technician ID. Select gel type (agarose %, TAE buffer). Document sample loading (µL volume, dye used). Select electrophoresis apparatus ID and run conditions (voltage, duration). Record molecular weight marker used. Upload gel image file. Document band presence/absence and estimated size (bp). Document any anomalies or failed bands. Assess purity and integrity for next step.

column.name: content
column.value: Gel Electrophoresis - PCR product verification and sizing

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 5

changeSet.author: openelis-vl

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 6

changeSet.comment: Create Library Preparation page for VL Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Library Preparation

column.name: instructions
column.value: Record library prep date/time and technician ID. Select library prep kit/protocol. Document DNA input amount (ng). Record barcodes/adapters used for each sample. Document shearing parameters (if applicable). Select library prep instrument ID. Record final library concentration and volume. Document size distribution (bp). Select target insert size. Document any deviations. Perform QC check if required.

column.name: content
column.value: Library Preparation - Sequencing library construction and QC

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 6

changeSet.author: openelis-vl

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 7

changeSet.comment: Create Bioanalyzer QC page for VL Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Bioanalyzer QC

column.name: instructions
column.value: Record Bioanalyzer run date/time and technician ID. Select Bioanalyzer chip type (DNA, RNA). Load samples in specified microfluidic lanes. Verify ladder run passes. Record library concentration (ng/µL). Document size distribution profile. Record DIN (DNA Integrity Number) if RNA. Document QC status (Pass/Fail) with acceptance criteria. If failed, document reason and next steps. Upload Bioanalyzer file output.

column.name: content
column.value: Bioanalyzer QC - Library quality and fragment size distribution analysis

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 7

changeSet.author: openelis-vl

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 8

changeSet.comment: Create Sequencing page for VL Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Record sequencing date/time and technician ID. Select sequencing platform (Illumina, PacBio, Nanopore). Document run parameters (read type, flow cell, reagent kit). Record loading concentration (pM). Select data output location and storage backup. Document run start/completion times. Monitor cluster density and phasing metrics. Record raw data file paths and naming convention. Document any run errors or quality issues. Obtain preliminary quality metrics.

column.name: content
column.value: Sequencing - Raw sequencing data generation and initial QC

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 8

changeSet.author: openelis-vl

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 9

changeSet.comment: Create Bioinformatics Analysis & Data Submission page for VL Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Bioinformatics Analysis & Data Submission

column.name: instructions
column.value: Record analysis start date/time and bioinformatician ID. Select analysis pipeline (genome assembly, variant calling, etc.). Document reference genome version and parameters. Record read mapping/alignment statistics. Document variant calls, copy numbers, or other analysis results. Perform secondary analysis review and validation. Select data submission repository (NCBI, ENA, etc.). Record submission accession numbers. Document data archival locations and retention periods. Generate analysis summary report.

column.name: content
column.value: Bioinformatics Analysis & Data Submission - Data processing, analysis, and public repository submission

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 9

changeSet.author: openelis-vl

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 10

changeSet.comment: Create Storage & Environmental Monitoring page for VL Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Storage & Environmental Monitoring

column.name: instructions
column.value: Manage physical sample storage and environmental conditions. Assign samples to hierarchical storage locations (Room → Freezer → Shelf → Rack → Box → Well). Select appropriate storage condition based on sample type (DNA: -20°C/-80°C, RNA: -80°C, PCR products: -20°C). Log daily temperature checks (AM/PM) with acceptable ranges. Track sample retrievals with date, staff, recipient signature, and retrieval purpose. Record sample disposals with method, date, and authorization. Monitor storage logbook audit trail for compliance and traceability.

column.name: content
column.value: Storage & Environmental Monitoring - Physical storage management, temperature monitoring, and sample lifecycle tracking

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 10
